parameters.query: SELECT id, latitude::float AS latitude, longitude::float AS longitude FROM praias WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT praia_id FROM pontos_interesse) ORDER BY id LIMIT 50

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ includedTypes: ['restaurant','bar','cafe'], maxResultCount: 20, locationRestriction: { circle: { center: { latitude: $json.latitude, longitude: $json.longitude }, radius: 500 } }, languageCode: 'pt' }) }}
